dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Pull-backup status for all configured source hosts.
dashboard.noHostsBody: Add a host under /etc/nspawn-vault/<host>/containers on the vault to start pulling backups.
dashboard.readOnlyHint: Ask an admin to change this.

host.noContainersTitle: No containers configured for this host
host.retentionHint: {{current}} stored now / {{retained}} would remain after the next GFS prune
host.noLogAvailable: No log data found for this pull (the journal may have already rotated it out).
host.dbBackedUpHint: Last successful pull included a database dump
host.pullStarted: Pull backup started. This can take anywhere from seconds to an hour depending on how much has changed since last time.
host.noSnapshotsAvailable: No snapshots available for this container yet.
host.ransomwareHint: Suspected ransomware: {{count}} changed files since the previous snapshot.

alert.staleBody: {{count}} source host(s) have stale or failed pull backups. Click a host below to investigate.
alert.staleBody_one: 1 source host has a stale or failed pull backup. Click below to investigate.
alert.staleBody_other: {{count}} source hosts have stale or failed pull backups. Click a host below to investigate.
alert.pullRunningBody: {{count}} pull backup(s) in progress right now.
alert.pullRunningBody_one: 1 pull backup in progress right now.
alert.pullRunningBody_other: {{count}} pull backups in progress right now.
alert.ransomwareBody: {{count}} source host(s) have a container with an unusually large number of changed files since its previous snapshot. Click a host below to investigate - GFS snapshots are still there to restore from.
alert.ransomwareBody_one: 1 source host has a container with an unusually large number of changed files since its previous snapshot. Click below to investigate - GFS snapshots are still there to restore from.
alert.ransomwareBody_other: {{count}} source hosts have a container with an unusually large number of changed files since its previous snapshot. Click a host below to investigate - GFS snapshots are still there to restore from.
alert.zfsNotLoaded: The zfs kernel module is not loaded for the running kernel ({{kernel}}). All pulls, prunes, and dataset reads on this vault are failing right now.
alert.zfsNotBuilt: dkms has not built the zfs module for the running kernel ({{kernel}}) yet - likely after an automatic kernel update. Run 'dkms install' for this kernel, or reboot into the kernel it was last built for.
alert.storageTitle: The vault is running low on storage
alert.storageBody: Only {{percent}}% free space left in the ZFS pool. Pulls and snapshots may start failing if it runs out entirely - prune old snapshots, adjust GFS retention, or expand the pool.

admin.description: Manage user accounts and LDAP authentication for nspawn-vault.
admin.allowRegistrationHint: When disabled, only existing accounts (and LDAP) can sign in.

hosts.title: Source Hosts
hosts.description: Which nspawn-cockpit hosts and containers this vault pulls backups from.
hosts.confirmDelete: Remove pull configuration for {{host}}? This does NOT delete existing backups/snapshots, only stops future pulls.
hosts.vaultKeyHint: Paste this on the source host (e.g. via cockpit-nspawn's pull-backup setup) - it's a public key, safe to display and share.
hosts.vaultKeyMissing: No SSH key found on the vault yet (/root/.ssh/nspawn-vault.pub is missing).
hosts.sshTrustWarning: This only writes the pull configuration on the vault. Copy the vault's public SSH key (above) into cockpit-nspawn's pull-backup setup on this source host, where the container runs — otherwise the pull timer won't work.

ldap.title: LDAP
ldap.enableHint: Users without a local account will be authenticated against LDAP.
ldap.bindDnTemplateHint: {username} is replaced with the entered username at login time.
ldap.bindPasswordPlaceholder: Leave unchanged to keep the current password
ldap.requiredGroupHint: If set, only members of this group may log in.
ldap.adminGroupHint: Members of this group get the admin role, re-checked on every login.

gfs.title: GFS Retention
gfs.description: How many snapshots to keep per interval before older ones are pruned.
gfs.pruneNowHint: Runs the same nightly GFS prune immediately instead of waiting for its 04:00 timer
gfs.pruneStarted: Prune started - check back shortly, this can take a moment across all hosts.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.description: Dead-man's-switch alerts when a source host's backups go stale or fail.
notify.secretPlaceholder: Leave unchanged to keep the current value
notify.smtpHint: One shared relay for all source hosts. Who actually gets emailed is set per source host, in the table above.
notify.testEmailHint: Sends one real email right now using the settings above - save them first so the test reflects what's actually stored.
notify.ransomwareHint: Every pull compares the new snapshot against the previous one via "zfs diff". If the number of changed/added/removed files reaches this threshold, it alerts immediately (same channels as above, plus its own banner on the dashboard). 0 disables the check.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Who has downloaded or browsed actual container data, and when.
